title: SQLancer TLP query with wrong results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255) NULL, c2 DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, NULL, 10.50);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (2, 'test', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE (NOT (c1 IS NULL)) IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE (c2 IS NOT NULL) OR (c1 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of NULL in SQL query conditions
